title: polygala rupestris subsp. font-queri
intro: Polygala rupestris subsp. font-queri is a subspecies of flowering plant in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae), specifically a type of polygala, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Polygala rupestris subsp. font-queri include its ability to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support the urinary system and promote overall well-being.
